name: Plains
reasoning: V2 best fulfills the prompt's post-apocalyptic science-fantasy vision with visible megastructure ruins and rusted steel frames integrated into the city architecture, creating the required contrast between ancient civilization and untamed wilderness. V1 shows a traditional fantasy city without the sci-fi elements, while V3 depicts a pure medieval castle that completely misses the post-apocalyptic setting. V2's composition is also superior for card readability with clear atmospheric perspective and excellent foreground wildflower framing.

artifacts_found.issue: Lacks post-apocalyptic megastructure elements; appears as traditional fantasy rather than science-fantasy hybrid
Missing megastructure ruins and sci-fi elements entirely; depicts pure medieval castle without post-apocalyptic setting
